title: Exception to multiparish compacts
doc_html:
§100.3.  Exception to multiparish compacts

This section shall not be authority for the creation of multiparish compacts for the establishment and/or operation of the thirteenth and fourteenth grades by parish school boards.  

Added by Acts 1972, No. 334, §1.
doc_text:
§100.3.  Exception to multiparish compacts
This section shall not be authority for the creation of multiparish compacts for the establishment and/or operation of the thirteenth and fourteenth grades by parish school boards.
Added by Acts 1972, No. 334, §1.
